Bug Title: Login redirect fails after OAuth callback on Safari
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Click 'Sign in with Google' on Safari 17. 2. Authenticate successfully. 3. Page stays blank instead of redirecting to dashboard.
Notes: Likely a cookie SameSite issue on Safari. NextAuth callback URL config may need adjustment.

Bug Title: Stripe webhook returns 500 on subscription cancelled event
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Cancel subscription from Stripe dashboard. 2. Check server logs. 3. Webhook handler throws unhandled error.
Notes: Missing handler for 'customer.subscription.deleted' event type. Priority fix before billing goes live.

Bug Title: Dashboard chart flickers on data refresh
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Load dashboard. 2. Wait for auto-refresh (30s). 3. Chart briefly disappears during re-render.
Notes: Fixed by adding loading state guard in useEffect. Deployed in hotfix v0.2.1.

Bug Title: Profile image upload fails for files over 2MB
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to profile settings. 2. Upload image larger than 2MB. 3. Spinner runs indefinitely, no error shown.
Notes: Need to add client-side file size validation and user-facing error message. Server limit is set correctly.

Bug Title: Mobile nav menu doesn't close after link click
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open site on mobile viewport. 2. Open hamburger menu. 3. Click any nav link. 4. Menu stays open.
Notes: Added onClick handler to close menu state on NavLink component. Merged to main.

Bug Title: Email verification link expires immediately on Gmail
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Register with Gmail. 2. Click verification link in email. 3. 'Link expired' error shows.
Notes: Gmail pre-fetches links for security scanning. Switched to 6-digit code verification instead — better UX anyway.
